macro.title: Senate confirms new Fed chair as Trump allies warn rate cuts may have to wait - The Washington Post
macro.summary: Kevin Warsh has promised to remake the central bank. His near party-line confirmation showed how far Washington political divides now extend to the Fed.

macro.title: Boston Fed’s Collins Flags Rate-Hike Scenario as Inflation Risks Tilt Higher - WSJ
Cisco Earnings, Revenue Beat As Stock Hits Record High Amid Strong AI Orders - Investor's Business Daily
macro.summary: Cisco reported fiscal Q3 earnings and revenue that topped estimates. Cisco stock, which hit a record high on Wednesday, climbed on the news.

macro.title: Allegiant CEO makes case for low-cost airline model as Sun Country acquisition closes - CNBC
macro.summary: Allegiant CEO Greg Anderson said leisure travel demand is still strong despite higher fuel prices.

macro.title: Huang, Musk, Cook Among Billionaire Delegation At Trump’s Xi Meeting - Forbes
macro.summary: Trump is set to meet with Chinese President Xi Jinping on Thursday.
